span.p:
Managed PostgreSQL 16
primary + sync replica
+ async replica
pg-fooddelivery.mdb…:6432
PgBouncer · remote_apply

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Managed Redis Cluster
3 шарда × master+replica
redis-fooddelivery…:6379
AOF everysec

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Managed Apache Kafka
3 брокера
kafka-fooddelivery…:9091
acks=all · ISR≥2

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Object Storage
fooddelivery-photos · fooddelivery-backups
Standard + Cold + Ice tiers
presigned upload · lifecycle 90→365→archive
